stemHtml: An aircraft is flying near the ITCZ and suffers buffeting due to clear air turbulence? What should be done?

options.b: Extend the flaps and slow the aircraft to V<sub>S</sub>.
options.c: Descend to a lower altitude and fly at the turbulence penetration speed.
options.d: Continue flying at present speed and altitude, CAT is temporary in the ITCZ.
